mapper.sql: id, category_code, title, summary, content, source_url, cover_url, author, view_count, status, publish_time, created_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update:
UPDATE cms_content
category_code = #{categoryCode},
title = #{title},
summary = #{summary},
content = #{content},
cover_url = #{coverUrl},
author = #{author},
status = #{status},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
id = #{id}
UPDATE cms_content SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
